summarizer.brief: Per-slot BIOS profile enables Gen5 on slots 1-2 and Gen4 on slots 3-6 to avoid 15% Gen5 link training failure on Rev B PCB.
key_facts: Gen5 link training has ~15% failure rate on slot positions 3-6 due to signal integrity margin issues in current PCB revision (Rev B).
PCB fix (Rev C) is estimated to take 8 weeks.
Three options were considered: A (default Gen5, accept failures), B (default Gen4, manual Gen5), C (per-slot BIOS profile).
Option C was chosen: per-slot configuration via BIOS profile.
Slots 1-2 are configured for PCIe Gen5 (full signal integrity margin).
Slots 3-6 are configured for PCIe Gen4 (safe mode until Rev C PCB).
The BIOS profile is deployed via BMC using ipmitool and Redfish API commands.
Verification after reboot uses: lspci -vvv | grep -E "LnkSta|Speed" | head -12
Rationale includes stability over speed, incremental approach, and traceability of test results.
The decision will be revisited when Rev C PCB samples arrive, estimated 2024-Q3.

commands.expected: Prepares the BMC for BIOS configuration changes; success returns no output.
Resets the BIOS setup password to empty; allows subsequent configuration changes.
Applies the per-slot speed profile to the system; no immediate output on success.
Displays negotiated link speed and status for each PCIe device; confirms correct per-slot configuration after reboot.

classifier.reason: ESD操作规范，包含必须/不允许规则，无故障事件

summarizer.brief: NPI 实验室 ESD 防护操作规范：腕带接地、工作台防护、器件搬运、特殊场景规则，防止 Gen5 器件隐性损伤。
key_facts: NPI 实验室频繁处理裸板、未封装芯片和高敏感器件（如 DDR5 DIMM、SSD、GPU 模组）。
静电放电（ESD）是导致器件隐性损伤的首要原因。
被 ESD 损伤的器件可能通过初始功能测试，但在客户现场数周后出现间歇性故障，导致高昂的 RMA 成本。
本规范适用于所有 NPI 团队成员在实验室环境中的操作。
任何接触电子器件前，操作人员必须佩戴防静电腕带并接地。
腕带电阻应在 1MΩ ± 10% 范围内（每日早班用腕带测试仪校验）。
腕带鳄鱼夹必须连接到工作台的接地柱，而非机箱外壳。
无线防静电腕带不被接受——其放电速度不足以保护 Gen5 速率器件。
ESD 工作台垫必须覆盖整个操作区域，不允许裸板直接接触金属台面。
台垫接地线与腕带接地线应连接到同一公共接地点（star grounding）。
离子风扇开启状态下操作非导电材料（如亚克力治具、塑料包装）。
离子风扇校验（每周一次）：使用 CPM 静电场测试仪，正极衰减时间 < 2 秒，负极衰减时间 < 2 秒，残余电压 < ±25V。
所有 PCB、DIMM、SSD 必须在 ESD 防护袋中搬运，不允许裸手持握非边缘区域。
拿取 DIMM 时只能持握两端边缘，不可触碰金手指和颗粒。
拿取 PCB 时持握板边或使用专用防静电托盘。
从 ESD 袋取出器件后，在 5 秒内放置到接地的 ESD 工作台面上。
拍照取证前先触摸接地柱放电，相机镜头距器件不小于 15cm，禁止使用闪光灯直射裸露芯片表面。
包装拆封必须在 ESD 保护区内进行，先拆外层纸箱，再在 ESD 台面上拆内层防静电袋。
干燥剂和缓冲材料立即放入回收桶，不留在工作台面。
一次违规：口头提醒 + QA 系统记录；两次违规：强制重新参加 ESD 培训；三次违规：暂停实验室准入权限，主管复核后恢复。
检查清单包括：腕带电阻测试（每日，操作人员自检）、台垫接地连续性（每周，实验室管理员）、离子风扇校验（每周，实验室管理员）、湿度监控 40-60% RH（持续，自动传感器）、ESD 培训更新（每年，质量部）。

commands.expected: 将腕带测试结果记录到质检系统，通常无输出或返回 pass 表示成功

classifier.reason: Explains thermal throttling concepts and mechanisms for reference, no failure event or procedure.

summarizer.brief: Thermal throttling mechanisms (PROCHOT, THERMTRIP, RAPL, CLTT/OLTT) in server platforms: layered defense from RAPL frequency reduction to emergency shutdown.
key_facts: Thermal throttling reduces processor performance to prevent overheating.
PROCHOT is an Intel-defined signal indicating Tjunction max (100-105°C) has been reached.
When PROCHOT is asserted, CPU frequency immediately drops to minimum P-state, causing 50-80% performance drop.
PROCHOT can be bidirectional: internal (CPU self-asserts) or external (BMC/VRM asserts).
External PROCHOT is used by BMC as a last-resort protection.
THERMTRIP is a hardware-level emergency shutdown that activates when die temperature exceeds ~125°C.
THERMTRIP causes immediate system power off without software notification.
After THERMTRIP, system will not power on until temperature drops below threshold.
BMC SEL may or may not capture THERMTRIP depending on timing.
DDR5 DIMMs have integrated temperature sensors for memory thermal throttling.
CLTT (Closed Loop Thermal Throttling) proactively reduces refresh rate, typical onset at 85°C.
OLTT (Open Loop Thermal Throttling) uses pre-configured throttling without real-time sensor feedback.
RAPL (Running Average Power Limit) enforces power/thermal budgets at platform level.
PL1 is the sustained power limit, typically equal to TDP.
PL2 is the burst power limit, typically 1.25 × TDP with a 28-second window.
PL4 is the peak power limit for instantaneous current protection.
When any RAPL limit is hit, CPU frequency and voltage are reduced to stay within budget.
Thermal mechanisms form a layered defense: normal → RAPL → PROCHOT → THERMTRIP.
All three mechanisms can trigger simultaneously as they operate on different parameters.
NPI validation must test at worst-case ambient inlet temperature (35°C or 40°C).
Full DIMM population affects memory thermals significantly.
Sustained workload is needed to verify RAPL PL2 timeout (some BIOS have incorrect defaults).
Fan failure scenarios must verify PROCHOT activates before THERMTRIP in single-fan-failure mode.
If thermal throttling is observed, root cause investigation should follow priority: fan curve → heatsink mounting pressure → BIOS thermal parameters → escalate to mechanical engineering.

commands.expected: Returns IA32_THERM_STATUS; bit 0 = 1 means PROCHOT active.
Shows package power, core temperature, package temperature every 1 second; used to detect thermal throttling.

commands.cmd: ipmitool sdr type Temperature | grep -i dimm
commands.expected: Lists temperature sensor readings for DIMMs.
Decodes thermal sensor data from DIMM over I2C.
Returns MSR_PKG_POWER_LIMIT; shows RAPL PL1/PL2 settings.
Shows package power, RAM power, busy percentage, average frequency every 5 seconds; used to verify power limiting.
Stresses all CPUs with matrix product workload for 1 hour; used to generate thermal load.
Logs average frequency, busy%, core temp, package temp, power every 10 seconds to CSV; used for thermal validation recording.
Lists all temperature and fan sensors; used to check current thermal status.

warnings: structure: pitfall ## Resolution is empty — verbatim fallback will attempt recovery

summarizer.brief: Granite-X 服务器 NVMe SSD 间歇性掉盘，根因为散热设计缺陷 + Samsung PM9A3 固件 GDC7302Q 热保护阈值 70°C 过激
key_facts: Granite-X 双路服务器采用 Intel Emerald Rapids 平台，CPU 为 Intel Xeon w9-3595X × 2
NVMe SSD 为 Samsung PM9A3 3.84TB × 24 (U.2 接口)，固件版本 GDC7302Q
NVMe backplane Rev 2.1 支持 24 × U.2 热插拔
PCIe Switch 为 Broadcom PEX89048 (48-lane PCIe Gen4 switch)，每个管理 12 块 NVMe 盘，共 2 个 Switch 覆盖 24 块盘
Switch 通过 PCIe Gen4 x16 上联至 CPU
操作系统 Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (kernel 5.15.0-91)，BIOS 版本 1.3.2-beta，BMC 固件 OpenBMC 2.12.0
散热方案为前端 6 × 8038 风扇 + 后端 2 × 6038 风扇
压力测试运行 72-96 小时后，1-3 块 NVMe SSD 突然从系统中消失，无法通过 lsblk 或 nvme list 检测到
重启后所有 NVMe 盘恢复正常，SMART 数据无永久性错误标记
dmesg 出现 'nvme nvmeX: I/O timeout' 和 'nvme nvmeX: Controller not ready; aborting reset' 错误
nvme smart-log 在掉盘前显示 critical_warning 字段非零（bit 4: volatile memory backup device failed）
BMC 传感器日志记录到 NVMe backplane 区域温度达到 72°C（阈值 70°C）
掉盘现象集中在 backplane 的 slot 9-12 和 slot 21-24（靠近电源模块侧）
PCIe Switch 的 event log 中记录了 Surprise Link Down 事件
如果掉盘集中在特定 slot 位置（slot 9-12 或 21-24）→ 走路径 A（散热问题）
如果掉盘随机分布且伴随 PCIe AER 错误 → 走路径 B（PCIe Switch 问题）
如果掉盘前 SMART critical_warning 非零 → 走路径 C（SSD 固件问题）
根因1（主因，占比 70%）：Granite-X 的 NVMe backplane 风道设计不合理，slot 9-12 和 21-24 位于电源模块热辐射区域，长时间满负载运行时 SSD 表面温度超过 70°C 触发固件的热保护掉盘
增加导风罩后 slot 间温差从 12°C 降至 4°C，问题消除
根因2（次因，占比 30%）：Samsung PM9A3 固件版本 GDC7302Q 的 composite temperature 热保护阈值设为 70°C，数据手册标称工作温度为 0-70°C，在高密度部署场景中过于激进
升级至 GDC7502Q 后阈值调整为 75°C，并增加了渐进式降速策略（70°C 开始降速，75°C 才掉盘）
路径 A 验证方法：临时将风扇设为全速模式运行 72 小时压力测试，无掉盘则确认散热问题
路径 A 确认后需用热成像仪拍摄 backplane 区域温度分布图，若温差 > 8°C 则需要增加导风罩或调整 backplane 布局
路径 B 中若 Surprise Link Down 事件与温度升高时间点吻合 → 回到路径 A
路径 B 中若 Link Down 伴随 Switch 固件 assertion → PCIe Switch 固件 bug，联系 Broadcom 获取 hotfix
路径 B 中若 Link Down 集中在特定端口 → 可能是 backplane 信号质量问题，需要 SI 测试
路径 C 中若批量 SSD 的 critical_warning bit 4（volatile memory backup）非零 → 联系 Samsung FAE，确认是否为已知电容批次问题
路径 C 中若 critical_warning bit 0（spare space）非零 → SSD 写入寿命问题，检查压测的写入量是否超出规格
NPI 阶段应在 full-load burn-in 前完成 CFD 仿真和实测温度 mapping
NPI 阶段应锁定 SSD 固件版本，并与 SSD 厂商确认已知问题列表
PCIe Switch 的 Surprise Link Down 事件可以帮助区分 SSD 故障 vs 链路层故障 vs 热保护
burn-in 监测应包含全程温度曲线记录，对斜率异常的 slot 位提前预警
热相关问题往往需要 48-96 小时才会暴露

commands.expected: 查看 Switch 上游链路的 PCIe 状态和错误寄存器
清除 Switch 所有事件计数器
在后台记录 Switch 事件，持续 24 小时
运行 24 小时 NVMe 压力测试，同时持续记录 Switch 事件

以人类可读格式显示 NVMe 控制器的完整标识信息，包括 vendor ID、serial number、firmware revision、supported features 等
显示 namespace 1 的详细信息，包括 LBA 格式、容量、利用率、数据保护设置等

commands.cmd:
cat > /tmp/nvme_temp_monitor.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
LOG_FILE="/var/log/nvme_temp_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).csv"
echo "timestamp,device,temperature,critical_warning,available_spare" > $LOG_FILE
while true; do
    for dev in /dev/nvme*n1; do
        SMART=$(nvme smart-log $dev 2>/dev/null)
        TEMP=$(echo "$SMART" | grep "^temperature" | awk '{print $3}')
        WARN=$(echo "$SMART" | grep "critical_warning" | awk '{print $3}')
        SPARE=$(echo "$SMART" | grep "available_spare " | awk '{print $3}')
        echo "$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M:%S),$(basename $dev),$TEMP,$WARN,$SPARE" >> $LOG_FILE
    done
    sleep 300
done
SCRIPT

decision_map.symptom: 掉盘前 SMART critical_warning 非零

summarizer.brief: PCIe Link Training fails in 15% of GPU cards; three root causes: physical connection (60%), signal integrity (25%), electrical compatibility (15%).
key_facts: NPI validation phase, new GPU accelerator card has PCIe link training failure in some servers.
Failure rate about 15%.
Same card behaves inconsistently across servers.
GPU accelerator card: self-developed AI inference card v2.0 (PCIe Gen5 x16).
Server platforms: mixed Platform-A (AMD EPYC) and Platform-B (Intel SPR).
Riser card: Rev 1.2.
lspci cannot identify GPU card, or identifies as unknown device.
Server BIOS POST stage PCIe initialization timeout warning.
dmesg shows 'pcieport: AER: Corrected error' or 'link training failed'.
In some cases, card can be identified but link speed degrades to Gen3 x4 (expected Gen5 x16).
First step: collect PCIe link status using lspci, dmesg, and sysfs.
Phenomena table: lspci completely cannot see device -> Path A; device visible but link speed/width degraded -> Path B; device visible but AER error storm -> Path C.
Path A: lspci completely cannot see device -> physical connection problem.
Path A actions: reseat GPU, check riser connector, inspect gold fingers, test in another slot.
If card recognized after slot change -> Riser card or original slot damaged, replace Riser card.
If all slots not recognized -> GPU card body fault, RMA.
Path B: device visible but link degraded -> signal integrity problem.
Path B actions: check BIOS PCIe rate not manually limited, check PCIe trace length, try downshift to Gen4 in BIOS, run PCIe link eye diagram test.
If Gen4 stable but Gen5 unstable -> signal integrity margin insufficient, need hardware team review PCB layout.
If Gen4 also unstable -> go to Path A physical connection check.
Path C: device visible and link normal but continuous AER errors -> electrical compatibility problem.
Path C actions: collect AER error details, check GPU card power consumption, measure 12V auxiliary power ripple, check GPU firmware version and upgrade.
If power/ripple normal but AER continues -> check GPU firmware version, upgrade to latest.
After firmware upgrade, monitor 24 hours using watch on aer_dev_correctable.
Physical connection issue (60%): Riser card Rev 1.2 latch design defect, pushed for Rev 1.3 fix.
Signal integrity (25%): Platform-B slot 3/4 trace too long, Gen5 margin insufficient.
Electrical compatibility (15%): GPU card v2.0 firmware PCIe equalization parameters need tuning for AMD platform.
Riser card Rev 1.2 latch design defect is the dominant cause.
路径 A：lspci 完全看不到设备时，通常是物理层问题
换 slot 后可识别 → Riser card 或原 slot 损坏，更换 Riser card
所有 slot 均不识别 → GPU 卡本体故障，送回硬件团队 RMA
物理连接排查步骤：关机断电，重新拔插 GPU 卡，确认金手指无氧化
检查 Riser card 连接器，确认卡扣完全锁定
用放大镜检查 PCIe 金手指是否有划痕或污染
路径 B：设备可见但 link 降级（如 Gen3 x4），通常是信号质量不达标
确认 BIOS 中 PCIe 速率未被手动限制
检查 PCIe trace 长度是否超规格（查阅 platform 设计文档）
尝试在 BIOS 中手动降速到 Gen4，观察是否稳定
若 Gen4 稳定但 Gen5 不稳定 → 信号完整性 margin 不足，需要硬件团队评估 PCB layout
若 Gen4 也不稳定 → 走路径 A 检查物理连接
运行 PCIe 链路眼图测试（需要 platform debug 工具）
路径 C：设备可见且 link 正常，但持续 AER 错误
采集 AER 错误详细信息：setpci 读取 CAP_EXP+0x10.l，以及 aer_dev_correctable 和 aer_dev_fatal 文件
检查 GPU 卡功耗是否超标
用示波器测量 12V 辅助供电纹波，确认 < 50mV
如果功耗/纹波正常但 AER 持续 → 检查 GPU 固件版本，升级至最新
固件升级后重启并监控 24 小时
物理连接不良占比 60%：Riser card Rev 1.2 的卡扣设计有缺陷，已推动 Rev 1.3 修复
信号完整性问题占比 25%：Platform-B 的 slot 3/4 trace 过长，Gen5 margin 不足
电气兼容性问题占比 15%：GPU 卡 v2.0 固件的 PCIe equalization 参数需要针对 AMD 平台调优

commands.expected: Displays link capabilities, status, negotiated width and speed. Empty output indicates device not detected.
Shows PCIe-related kernel messages. Presence of 'link training failed' or AER errors indicates failure.
Outputs current link speed in GT/s. Empty or file not found means device not present.
Outputs current link width, e.g., x16, x8, x4. Smaller width indicates degradation.
Lists all PCI devices with matching description. Empty output means no GPU detected.
Shows system slot information including type and length. Helps verify PCIe slot configuration.
Generates an eye diagram image for PCIe link analysis. No output means success; errors indicate tool failure.
Displays the PCIe link control register value. Used to check link status and error reporting.
Shows the count of correctable AER errors. Increasing count indicates errors.
Shows the count of fatal AER errors. Non-zero indicates serious issues.
Displays sensor readings filtered for PCIe, GPU, or power. High power readings may indicate issues.
Outputs current firmware version of the GPU card.
Updates GPU firmware. Requires confirmation; success message expected.
Monitors the correctable error count every 60 seconds. Increasing count indicates AER storm.
输出为空则设备完全不可见（路径 A）；输出 accelerator/gpu 但为 unknown device 则需进一步判断
显示 PCIe slot 信息和能力，确认 BIOS 是否限制了速率
生成 PCIe 链路眼图，评估信号完整性 margin
显示 PCIe 设备能力寄存器值，用于分析 AER 能力
显示可纠正 AER 错误计数；持续增长表示电气兼容性问题
显示致命 AER 错误计数；非零值表示严重问题
显示 GPU 功耗读数，判断是否超标
显示当前 GPU 固件版本
刷写 GPU 固件到指定版本；成功后需重启
每 60 秒监控一次 AER 可纠正错误计数，观察趋势

classifier.reason: 具体失败事件：ECC错误导致重启，含根因（DIMM缺陷）和解决（更换DIMM），符合pitfall

summarizer.brief: Samsung DDR5 DIMM 颗粒缺陷导致 ECC 单比特错误累积，48h burn-in 后触发系统重启，交叉换位确认硬件故障后更换 DIMM 并 72h burn-in 验证通过
key_facts: 服务器在 burn-in 压力测试 48 小时后出现间歇性重启
BMC 日志显示内存 ECC 错误计数快速递增，最终触发 BIOS 的 uncorrectable error 阈值
平台为 Intel Sapphire Rapids 双路服务器
内存为 Samsung DDR5-4800 RDIMM 32GB × 16
BIOS 版本为 2.1.0-rc3
BMC 固件版本为 1.05.02
服务器运行 48-72 小时后自动重启，无 kernel panic
BMC SEL 日志中 Memory ECC Error 事件从 slot A1/DIMM 0 开始递增
mcelog 报告 corrected error count 超过 2000/小时
重启后短时间内运行正常，但错误重新累积
SEL 日志一致指向 CPU0 Channel A / DIMM slot 0
交换 DIMM 后 ECC 错误跟随 DIMM 迁移到新 slot，确认为 DIMM 本体故障
更换故障 DIMM 后，清除 BMC SEL 日志
运行完整 burn-in 测试 72 小时后 ECC 错误为 0，问题解决
根因：该批次 Samsung DDR5 DIMM 存在个别颗粒缺陷，在持续高温高负载下 single-bit error 率超出正常范围，最终累积为 uncorrectable error 触发系统重启
NPI 阶段 burn-in 时间不应少于 72 小时，48 小时不足以暴露间歇性内存问题
ECC corrected error > 500/小时即应标记为可疑，不要等到 uncorrectable 才处理
DIMM 交叉换位是区分 slot 问题 vs DIMM 本体问题的标准方法

commands.expected: 显示内存相关的 SEL 事件；如有 Memory ECC Error 则输出事件行，空输出表示无相关事件
显示内存传感器中 ECC 相关的状态信息
输出 machine check 日志，包括 corrected error 计数；持续增长表明问题
分配 28GB 内存运行 3 次测试，正常通过时输出 pass 信息，失败则报告错误
24 小时内存压力测试，期间监控 ECC 错误是否随 DIMM 迁移
清除所有 SEL 日志，为后续验证提供干净基线
后台运行 72 小时压力测试，用于 burn-in 验证
每小时自动检查一次 mcelog 最新 5 行，监控 ECC 错误计数变化

summarizer.brief: Standard procedure for updating BMC firmware on production servers, including pre-update health check, backup, flash, post-update verification, and rollback.
key_facts: BMC firmware updates are high-risk operations; a failed update can brick the management controller, requiring physical board replacement.

Prerequisites: target server accessible via BMC (IPMI/Redfish), firmware binary validated with SHA256 checksum, maintenance window minimum 30 minutes per server, rollback firmware image available on TFTP server.

Step 1: Pre-Update Health Check: verify BMC reachable (mc info), check SEL for critical events (sel list | tail -20), record current firmware version (mc info | grep Firmware Revision), and if active workloads, gracefully shut down OS (shutdown -h now) then verify power off (chassis power status).
Step 2: Backup Current Configuration: export BMC config via IPMI raw command and Redfish (Managers/1), and record network settings (lan print 1).

Step 3: Upload and Flash Firmware: verify firmware checksum matches release notes, initiate update via Redfish SimpleUpdate with TFTP, monitor progress via TaskService, and do NOT power cycle or disconnect network during flash.
Step 4: Post-Update Verification: wait for BMC to come online (ping loop up to 5 min), verify new firmware version, run sensor list and SEL check, then test power on.
Step 5: Restore Configuration (if needed): restore network settings (IP source, IP address, netmask, gateway) if reset by update.
Step 6: Sign-Off: log the update in asset management system using holmes-qa with server serial, firmware versions, operator, and status.
Outcome: BMC firmware at target version, all sensor readings normal, server can power on/off via IPMI, network configuration intact, update logged.
Rollback: flash previous version using same Step 3 procedure; if BMC unreachable, use USB recovery image and BMC recovery jumper (refer to platform hardware guide section 7.3).

commands.expected: shows BMC info including firmware revision; non-empty indicates BMC reachable and healthy

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS sel list | tail -20
commands.expected: shows last 20 SEL entries; empty or only informational entries indicates no critical events

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS chassis power status
commands.expected: shows power status; should be 'Chassis Power is off' before update

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS mc info | grep "Firmware Revision"
commands.expected: prints current firmware version for rollback reference
initiates graceful shutdown of OS; verify later with power status
waits 30 seconds for OS shutdown to complete
exports BMC configuration to binary file; success if file created non-empty
exports BMC Redfish state to JSON; success if file created
prints current network settings (IP, netmask, gateway) for rollback reference
outputs SHA256 hash; compare to expected hash from release notes (e.g. a3f2e8d1...)
initiates firmware update; returns task ID for monitoring progress
repeatedly shows update state and progress; wait until State=Completed

commands.cmd: for i in $(seq 1 30); do ping -c 1 -W 2 $BMC_IP > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "BMC online at $(date)" && break; echo "Waiting... ($i/30)"; sleep 10; done
commands.expected: loops up to 5 minutes until BMC responds to ping; prints online when ready

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS sensor list | head -10
commands.expected: shows first 10 sensor readings; all should be in normal range

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS sel list | tail -5
commands.expected: shows last 5 SEL entries; should not show critical events

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS chassis power on
commands.expected: powers on server; confirms IPMI power control works; check power status if needed

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS lan set 1 ipsrc static
commands.expected: sets IP source to static; no output on success

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS lan set 1 ipaddr $BMC_IP
commands.expected: sets BMC IP address; no output on success

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS lan set 1 netmask 255.255.255.0
commands.expected: sets netmask; no output on success

commands.cmd: ipmitool -I lanplus -H $BMC_IP -U admin -P $BMC_PASS lan set 1 defgw ipaddr $GATEWAY_IP
commands.expected: sets default gateway; no output on success
logs the update in asset management system; prints confirmation of successful log
